problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
